hash_semantics.source_content_sha256: detects a new CelesTrak source version before JSON reformatting
hash_semantics.artifact_file_sha256: detects local modification of each locked on-disk artifact

bounded_snapshot_retention.validity_semantics: The model represents one frozen GP0 snapshot propagated only inside the preregistered experiment window. GP1 uses the same source family, is a blind future reference, and is never fed back into the model.

rationale: A post-freeze HTTP timestamp alone does not prove that the source content changed. Re-fetching the model input after topology generation could also create a snapshot/topology mismatch. This amendment adds a content-and-epoch gate, permits only the separately frozen same-threshold Supplemental GP failover after the primary standard GP gate fails, makes GP0 immutable, locks the first same-source-family GP1 as a blind reference, and bounds retained model orbit data to exactly those two logical snapshots.
